titleStmt.title: Postcard from George D. Roche to Nancy McCarthy, 2 September 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: George D. Roche

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
This is a postcard from George D. Roche to his niece Nancy congratulating her on passing her Inter Exam. A French priest who works as an interpreter has joined them, along with Fr. Bleasdale “and nobody gets a look in now with the pair of them”. He remarks they are kept busy.
Nancy McCarthy was a well-practiced letter-writer, and her collection of correspondence spans eighty years. This postcard is one of seven included in the Letters of 1916 collection written to Nancy by her uncle, George D. Roche, on active service with the 7th London regiment during World War I.

msIdentifier.repository: UCC Library Special Collections and Archives

correspAction.placeName: The Convent, Mountrath, Queen's County, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
G. Helong, 21, Rue St. Martin, Amiens Vise Paris n 118
Guevve 1914-1916
Intérieur de la Basilique - Le Maitre Autel
Interior of the Basilica - The Great Altar
Après le bombardement - After the bombardment
BL/PP/NMC/608 CARTE POSTALE Adresse Miss Nancy McCarthy Brigidine Convent
Mountrath
Ireland Father Bleasdale says he is going
to write to you. So lookout for squalls! France
2/9/16 My dear Nancy Correspondance Congratulations on passing your Inter
Exam. I'd leave Father Bleasdale
alone but there are two of them now!
I've got a French priest to look
after as well — he is attached to
us as interpreter and nobody
gets a look in now with the pair
of them. Hope you have quite
recovered from your camping out
adventure. Haven't got time to do
so here as we are at it nearly
all the time Best of luck and
love from Uncle George
